drill_prompt: In يَسْأَلُكَ, mark the imperfect prefix, verb stem, and object pronoun. Which part contributes "you"?
learner_explanation: A written Qur'anic token may contain a verb plus an attached object pronoun. The final كَ is not decoration; it contributes "you" to the hover.
nahw_lesson: The following explicit subject controls contextual wording, but it does not erase the attached object pronoun.
sarf_lesson: Segment the imperfect host and suffix pronoun before choosing an English hover.
what_failed: A lemma/entry gloss was shown as a token hover and the attached object pronoun was omitted.
